positive: A majestic, stylized woodland creature, perhaps a mythical fox or a spirit wolf, rendered in a clean, minimalist linework style. The creature is seated in a powerful, serene, and symmetrical pose, surrounded by stylized floral elements and geometric forest motifs. Use a limited color palette of deep emerald green, burnt orange, and cream, emphasizing high contrast silhouettes suitable for printing on apparel. Vector art aesthetic, negative space utilization is key. Overhead studio lighting, ultra-detail, central composition, perfect print quality, forest magic, ethereal, symmetrical design.
negative: blur, ugly, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, watermark, text, signature, noise, artifacts, low contrast, cluttered, photo, realistic, logo
